title: MES Consultant (Presales)
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • The Solution Architect will play a pivotal role in defining, designing, and delivering cutting edge architectures for MES and L3 solutions including integration approaches and interface that ensure seamless system performance.
  • This role combines technical expertise and business acumen to ensure solution architecture meet all non functional and quality requirements, including cybersecurity, scalability, reliability, performance, and cost-effectiveness Working closely with Consultant and Proposal Manager, the Solution Architect develop technical architecture, frameworks, and detailed solutions while aligning with customer needs and driving value propositions in proposals and presentations.
  • Assess emerging technologies such as AI, IoT, digital twins, and OT/IT integration tools, recommending the best for client challenges. Collaborate with clients to gather, document technical requirements and translate them into solution decisions.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s/master’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field.
  • Certifications in cloud architecture, cybersecurity, or industrial systems
  • Minimum 8+ years of experience in solution architecture, preferably in industries like Material and F&B etc
  • Proven experience in designing scalable architectures for edge, cloud, and hybrid environments

Other

  • Knowledge/ Professional Skills (Technical knowledge or skills required to perform the job.)
  • Skill of ensuring compatibility and seamless integration of solution architectures with industrial platforms such as SCADA,DCS, IoT sensors, and enterprise systems like ERP, LIMS, QMS, CMMS, and MES
  • Deep understanding of industrial communication protocols such as OPC UA, MQTT, and IT/OT convergence methodologies
  • Advanced knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks and encryption standards.
  • Knowledge of industry trends, client expectations, and best practices in industrial digital transformation and Industry 4.0
  • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts to diverse stakeholders analytical and problem-solving skills for addressing complex industrial requirements

Navneet Goel
navneet.goel@manpower.com.sg
EA License No. : 02C3423 | Reg No. R1982194

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
